message:
🐛 Fix OPA card kubectl commands using kubectlProxy

Switch from custom WebSocket implementation to the established
kubectlProxy singleton for consistency and proper request handling.

The kubectlProxy class handles:
- WebSocket connection management
- Request queuing and concurrency limits
- Proper timeout handling
- Response correlation

This fixes the issue where OPA status checks were silently failing
on clusters that have Gatekeeper installed (vllm-d, platform-eval).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
